name: diagStartAuth, diagStartAuthGeneric, _Diag_AuthResult
title: diagStartAuth, diagStartAuthGeneric, _Diag_AuthResult
syntax: long diagStartAuth(char ecuQualifier[], char jobQualifier[]); // form 1
long diagStartAuthGeneric(char ecuQualifier[], char genericString[]); // form 2
description: Starts the diagnostics authentication process. The result is indicated to the callback function _Diag_AuthResult.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Qualifier of the ECU or target as set in the diagnostic configuration dialog for the respective diagnostic description.

parameters.name: genericString
parameters.description: Generic parameters to select and configure the security source runtime implementation.

parameters.name: jobQualifier
parameters.description: Diagnostic job to be executed. Should be defined in the diagnostic description.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: Result of the authentication process - see error code.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
